name: render_image
description: Generate images from text descriptions using configured models (DALL-E 3, SDXL, etc.). Reads model choice from global config.yml.

prompt.description: The detailed text description for image generation.

output_path.description: Path to save the generated image (e.g., 'output.png').

size.description: Image size (e.g., '1024x1024'). Optional, defaults to global config.
